sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n92147" key="r(amma/tinos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ῥαμμάτ-ινος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">η</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n92147.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of suture-thread</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἀγκτῆρες</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heliod.</author> </bibl> </cit> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:44:10:4" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">44.10.4</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
